'''âg-dh-ng''' ('''kagadhang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cob|cob]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cob|cob]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-dh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhang|thigadhang]] || [[word:jigadhang|jigadhang]] || [[word:shigadhang|shigadhang]] || [[word:kigadhang|kigadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadhang|thuthugadhang]] || [[word:jujugadhang|jujugadhang]] || [[word:shushugadhang|shushugadhang]] || [[word:kukugadhang|kukugadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadhang|thugadhang]] || [[word:jugadhang|jugadhang]] || [[word:shugadhang|shugadhang]] || [[word:kugadhang|kugadhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadhang|thugadhang]] || [[word:jugadhang|jugadhang]] || [[word:shugadhang|shugadhang]] || [[word:kugadhang|kugadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadhang|thegadhang]] || [[word:jegadhang|jegadhang]] || [[word:shegadhang|shegadhang]] || [[word:kegadhang|kegadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadhang|thothogadhang]] || [[word:jojogadhang|jojogadhang]] || [[word:shoshogadhang|shoshogadhang]] || [[word:kokogadhang|kokogadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadhang|thogadhang]] || [[word:jogadhang|jogadhang]] || [[word:shogadhang|shogadhang]] || [[word:kogadhang|kogadhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadhang|thogadhang]] || [[word:jogadhang|jogadhang]] || [[word:shogadhang|shogadhang]] || [[word:kogadhang|kogadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgadhang|thĂŠgadhang]] || [[word:jĂŠgadhang|jĂŠgadhang]] || [[word:shĂŠgadhang|shĂŠgadhang]] || [[word:kĂŠgadhang|kĂŠgadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadhang|thathagadhang]] || [[word:jajagadhang|jajagadhang]] || [[word:shashagadhang|shashagadhang]] || [[word:kakagadhang|kakagadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadhang|thagadhang]] || [[word:jagadhang|jagadhang]] || [[word:shagadhang|shagadhang]] || [[word:kagadhang|kagadhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadhang|thagadhang]] || [[word:jagadhang|jagadhang]] || [[word:shagadhang|shagadhang]] || [[word:kagadhang|kagadhang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagadhang|shagadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadhang|goshagadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadhang|gokishagadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadhangnĂŒ|shagadhangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhangnknĂŒ|goshagadhangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhangnĂŒ|gokishagadhangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadhangshĂ«|shagadhangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkshĂ«|goshagadhangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadhangshĂ«|gokishagadhangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhangro|shagadhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkro|goshagadhangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhangro|gokishagadhangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhangmu|shagadhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkmu|goshagadhangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhangmu|gokishagadhangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadhangsher|shagadhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadhangnksher|goshagadhangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadhangsher|gokishagadhangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadhang|shagadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkng|goshagadhangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadhang|gokishagadhang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadhangya|shagadhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkya|goshagadhangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadhangya|gokishagadhangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadhangyam|shagadhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkyam|goshagadhangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadhangyam|gokishagadhangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhangnĂŒshĂ«|shagadhangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshagadhangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishagadhangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhangnĂŒro|shagadhangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhangnknĂŒro|goshagadhangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhangnĂŒro|gokishagadhangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhangnĂŒmu|shagadhangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhangnknĂŒmu|goshagadhangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhangnĂŒmu|gokishagadhangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhangshĂ«nĂŒ|shagadhangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshagadhangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishagadhangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhangshĂ«ro|shagadhangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkshĂ«ro|goshagadhangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhangshĂ«ro|gokishagadhangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhangshĂ«mu|shagadhangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkshĂ«mu|goshagadhangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhangshĂ«mu|gokishagadhangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhangronĂŒ|shagadhangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkronĂŒ|goshagadhangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhangronĂŒ|gokishagadhangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhangroshĂ«|shagadhangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkroshĂ«|goshagadhangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhangroshĂ«|gokishagadhangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhangromu|shagadhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkromu|goshagadhangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhangromu|gokishagadhangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhangmunĂŒ|shagadhangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkmunĂŒ|goshagadhangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhangmunĂŒ|gokishagadhangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhangmushĂ«|shagadhangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkmushĂ«|goshagadhangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhangmushĂ«|gokishagadhangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhangmuro|shagadhangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhangnkmuro|goshagadhangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhangmuro|gokishagadhangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
